title: DataSourceHealth
description: Health and freshness status for one data source, used by the actionability gate and Command dashboard.

x-changelog.0.2.0: T161 Phase 2 finalization: add dataset and next_expected_refresh_at fields; FRESH added to status enum for LAGGED sources (via notes convention); descriptions added

dataset.description: DatasetName enum value this health record corresponds to (e.g. 'prices_daily', 'sec_form4'). Absent for legacy records.

status.description: Operational status. HEALTHY = normal. DEGRADED = partial data or elevated errors. STALE = data not refreshed within window. UNAVAILABLE = no data accessible. RATE_LIMITED = API quota exhausted.

checked_at.description: Wall-clock time this health check was performed (ISO 8601).

freshness.description: Freshness of the most recent data from this source. FRESH = within expected window. AGING = approaching stale boundary. STALE = past window. UNAVAILABLE = no data.

last_success_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful refresh (ISO 8601). Null if never succeeded.

observed_lag_seconds.description: Measured lag in seconds between data as-of and the time it was available for use. Null if not measured.

error_count.description: Number of consecutive errors before this check.

reliability_score.description: Rolling reliability estimate in [0, 1]. 1.0 = no recent errors.

rate_limit_reset_at.description: When the rate limit resets, if status is RATE_LIMITED (ISO 8601). Null otherwise.

next_expected_refresh_at.description: For lagged sources (e.g. SEC 13F between filings), the expected time of the next filing or refresh. Absent for continuously-refreshed sources.

notes.description: Human-readable notes for the dashboard. Structured codes may appear here (e.g. 'provider_fallback_active: yfinance', 'lagged_by_design: next_filing_expected 2026-08-15').
